seoTitle: Kiama Downs vs Kiama Heights — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Kiama Downs vs Kiama Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kiama Downs and Kiama Heights.
heading: Kiama Downs vs Kiama Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kiama Downs, New South Wales and Kiama Heights, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kiama Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Kiama Downs (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kiama Downs or Kiama Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kiama Downs has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Kiama Heights scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kiama Downs scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Kiama Heights scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kiama Downs or Kiama Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kiama Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
